name: Drake
bio: Drake has a durable catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Drake remains closely associated with God's Plan and One Dance, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like God's Plan and One Dance still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings even after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and listener rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand help extend catalog value over time.
